title: Carved
description: Allows to carve melons, add Pale Pumpkins and also to input Soul Torches into into any Carved Pumpkin and Melon
body:
**HAPPY HALLOWEEN**

**Carved** brings a fresh addition to Minecraft’s classic crops with **New Pumpkin Styles**, **Carved Melons**, and **Pale Pumpkins**, inspired by the upcoming **Pale Garden** update!
This mod reimagines the harvest with carved variations and adds a haunting charm to your farms and builds. Enhance your Minecraft experience with **Carved** and discover a new way to make your world spookier and more mystical!

![ALL OF THE NEW CARVES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d31f9e3b7ee790137076f8e4c61053330de9312f.png)



[![AFFILIATES](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaosMCC/Badges/refs/heads/main/Sponsor%20Sparked.svg)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3169)
